name: apple-mail
description: Natural language interface for Apple Mail and Apple Calendar: search, compose, triage, organize, analyze, verify drafts, and manage calendar events with 41 MCP tools plus bundled workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Draft-safe Apple Mail and Apple Calendar workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Natural language Apple Mail and Apple Calendar workflows for Codex and Claude: search, compose drafts, reply, forward, triage, organize, analyze, export, manage attachments, list and create calendar events, check availability, and manage calendars through a local macOS MCP server. Default plugin launches with --draft-safe so agents create reviewable drafts instead of sending mail, and calendar deletes stay blocked.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my inbox and draft replies.
Find emails from this week that need action.
